children.label: Question
children.name: question
children.default: What question should this FAQ answer?

children.label: Answer
children.name: answer
children.default: Add a concise answer here. You can use formatting, links, and lists.

default.question: What question should this FAQ answer?
default.answer: Add a concise answer here. You can use formatting, links, and lists.

default.question: Can I add more FAQ items?
default.answer: Yes. This module uses a repeater field, so editors can add as many question and answer pairs as needed.

default.question: Can answers include rich formatting?
default.answer: Yes. The answer field is rich text and supports links, lists, and standard text formatting.
